prompt: Extreme high-angle bird's-eye view full-body shot of a woman standing confidently at the summit of a rugged mountain peak. She looks up at the camera with a bright, friendly gaze, cheerful and playful smile. Her right hand is raised near her eye making a clear peace sign (V-sign / YA gesture), fingers visibly formed. Her shoulders are slightly slouched, creating a top-down foreshortening effect that makes her head look larger than her feet, with heavy wide-angle distortion. She is wearing a distinct outfit with an inner layer top and matching pants, with specific shoes — all replicated from a reference image in exact color and design. Her hairstyle, length, color, and texture are also preserved exactly as shown in the reference, no headwear. The environment is the summit of a high mountain with jagged rocks and a cliff edge. The background features dramatic cloud formations in the distant sky arranged to clearly spell out the word "BeautyVerse" hovering above the mountain ranges below. Bright natural daylight, soft clouds beneath the peak, majestic and adventurous high-altitude atmosphere with surreal elements. Style: adventure outdoor photography with surrealist elements. Ultra-wide angle lens shot from above to emphasize the height of the peak. 8K resolution, hyper-realistic rock textures and fabric weave. Aspect ratio 3:4.
